text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After our joint training session, we are issued a
challenge from Happy Meek and Trainer Kiryuin.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
They mentioned that any kind of training is fine,
so...
choice_data_list: Let's see who has more speed!
Let's see who has more stamina!
Let's see who has more power!
Let's see who has more guts!
Let's see who has more wit!
Let's see who has more energy!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: We decide to challenge Happy Meek with speed!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We decide to challenge Happy Meek with
stamina!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: We decide to challenge Happy Meek with power!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: We decide to challenge Happy Meek with guts!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: We decide to challenge Happy Meek with wit!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: We decide to challenge Happy Meek with energy!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A splendid victory by <chrname>!
Happy Meek leaves the bout even more fired up
than before.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Another splendid victory by
<chrname>! Our rivals assure us that
they will be back for more later.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Happy Meek proves to be very strong. Though
she is disappointed with the result,
<chrname> resolves to emerge
victorious next time!
